layout.grid: 3-column grid: sidebar (1/4) + main content (2/4) + agent status panel (1/4)

tailwind_classes.Sidebar: w-64 h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white flex flex-col p-4
tailwind_classes.TaskCard: bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-4 mb-3 cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
tailwind_classes.AgentStatusPanel: w-80 h-screen bg-gray-50 border-l p-4 overflow-y-auto
tailwind_classes.CreateTaskForm: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-lg p-6 max-w-lg mx-auto
